svg.title: RAG ingestion pipeline
svg.desc: All pipeline outputs and survey responses are merged per doctor, chunked by section, embedded, and stored in ChromaDB with metadata

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields does Pipeline A JSON output contain?')
sendPrompt('What does Pipeline B produce after stamp verification?')
sendPrompt('What does the scraper agent report include?')
sendPrompt('How are survey responses structured before ingestion?')
sendPrompt('How are all sources merged into one document per doctor?')
sendPrompt('How should the document be chunked — by section or by size?')
g.text: Split by section: personal, verdicts, jobs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Which embedding model is best for medical credential text?')
sendPrompt('How is ChromaDB organized — collections, metadata fields?')
g.text: Vectors + metadata: doctor ID, chunk type
